staticText.text: Consign and airmall documents to (Consignar y enviar documentos por vía aérea a):

Important Instructions: Commercial invoices must be in SPANISH and FOUR copies showing net and gross weights and SIGNED by shippers. The following legend must appear: Declaramos bajo juramento que los precios y detalles de esta factura son verdaderos: Two original copies of Bill of Landing but no consultar invoices needed DO NOT INSURE, we are covered under a floating policy in our country. COPIA - NO - NEGOCIABLE
Please refer to the above number in all invoices and correspondence Favor referirse al número arriba indicado en las Facturas
